title: Expectations & Readings
content:
Expectations & Readings
In Week 2, you will:

Read the Introduction to Writing sections below by clicking on each of the links:
Essay Writing
Review Chapter 3 Section 1: Narration specifically The Purpose of Narrative Writing
Chapter 3 Section 3: Description
Chapter 6 Section 4: Descriptive Essay
Chapter 4 Section 3: Drafting
Chapter 5 Section 1: Developing a Strong, Clear Thesis Statement
Chapter 5 Section 2: Writing Body Paragraphs
Chapter 5 Section 3: Organizing Your Writing
Chapter 7 Section 4: Strategies for Gathering Reliable Information
Chapter 8 Section 1: Creating a Rough Draft and Avoiding Plagiarism
Grammar
Chapter 14 Section 4: Pronouns
Chapter 12 Section 5: Pronouns
Chapter 12 Section 6: Adjectives and Adverbs
Complete the
Interactive Lecture
Week 2 Weekly Writing Warm-up (Due by the end of the week.)
Participate in
Week 2 Discussion: Using Descriptive Language (In Class)
Submit
Week 2 Assignment: Narrative Essay - Rough Draft (Due by the end of the week.)
